---
title: "PlotBiases"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-20"
---


```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(ggrepel)
library(car)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(GGally)
```


# Preparation

```{r}
bias_raw <- readr::read_csv(here("Data", "bias_WS_Ref_TotalVocab_2025Jun18.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
feat_raw <- readr::read_csv(here("Data", "LinguisticFeatures.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

bias <- bias_raw %>% mutate(
  language = str_squish(language),
  form     = str_squish(form),
  lexical_class = str_squish(lexical_class),
  measure  = str_squish(measure))
feat <- feat_raw %>% mutate(language = str_squish(language))

bias_ws <- bias %>% filter(form == "WS") %>%
  inner_join(feat, by = "language") %>% 
  subset(lexical_class != "Function Words")

# Check
bias_ws %>% count(lexical_class, measure) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

bias_ws %>% count(language, lexical_class) %>%
  filter(n > 1)
```



# Linguistic features and frequency (only those that showed significant effects)

```{r}
df_freq_z <- read.csv(here("Results", "df_freq_z.csv"), header=TRUE)
df_freq_z <- df_freq_z %>% select(language, starts_with("freq_mean"))

bias_ws <- bias_ws %>% select(-order, -lexical_class, -mean, -ci_lower, -ci_upper) %>% inner_join(df_freq_z) %>% 
  distinct()

df_ling_freq <- bias_ws %>% 
  pivot_longer(starts_with("freq_mean"), names_sep = "__", 
               names_to = c("tmp", "Category"), values_to = "mean_freq") %>% 
  select(-tmp) %>% 
  mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels =c("Nouns", "Verbs", "Adjectives")))


#== Case position

df_ling_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = posCaseAffix, y = mean_freq, fill = posCaseAffix)) +
  # geom_violin(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_boxplot(fill="white", alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  guides(fill = "none")

df_ling_freq %>% subset(posCaseAffix %in% c("Absent", "CaseSuffixes")) %>% 
  group_by(Category, posCaseAffix) %>% 
  summarise(N.lang = n(), mean_mean_freq = mean(mean_freq), sd_mean_freq = sd(mean_freq))

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * posCaseAffix + (1|language), 
     data = df_ling_freq %>% subset(posCaseAffix %in% c("Absent", "CaseSuffixes")))
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ posCaseAffix | Category) %>% pairs()



#== Nominal plurality

df_ling_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = nomPlural, y = mean_freq, fill = nomPlural)) +
  # geom_violin(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_boxplot(fill="white", alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  guides(fill = "none")

df_ling_freq %>% 
  group_by(Category, nomPlural) %>% 
  summarise(N.lang = n(), mean_mean_freq = mean(mean_freq), sd_mean_freq = sd(mean_freq))

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * nomPlural + (1|language), 
     data = df_ling_freq)
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ nomPlural | Category) %>% pairs()



#== Pro-drop

df_ling_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = proDrop, y = mean_freq, fill = proDrop)) +
  # geom_violin(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_boxplot(fill="white", alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  guides(fill = "none")

df_ling_freq %>% 
  group_by(Category, proDrop) %>% 
  summarise(N.lang = n(), mean_mean_freq = mean(mean_freq), sd_mean_freq = sd(mean_freq))

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * proDrop + (1|language), 
     data = df_ling_freq)
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ proDrop | Category) %>% pairs()



#== Adjective-noun order

df_ling_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = orderAdjN, y = mean_freq, fill = orderAdjN)) +
  # geom_violin(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_boxplot(fill="white", alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  guides(fill = "none")

df_ling_freq %>% 
  group_by(Category, orderAdjN) %>% 
  summarise(N.lang = n(), mean_mean_freq = mean(mean_freq), sd_mean_freq = sd(mean_freq))

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * orderAdjN + (1|language), 
     data = df_ling_freq)
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ orderAdjN | Category) %>% pairs()



#== Tense marking

df_ling_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tense, y = mean_freq, fill = tense)) +
  # geom_violin(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_boxplot(fill="white", alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  guides(fill = "none")

df_ling_freq %>% subset(tense %in% c("Absent", "PastPresent")) %>% 
  group_by(Category, tense) %>% 
  summarise(N.lang = n(), mean_mean_freq = mean(mean_freq), sd_mean_freq = sd(mean_freq))

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * tense + (1|language), 
     data = df_ling_freq %>% subset(tense %in% c("Absent", "PastPresent")))
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ tense | Category) %>% pairs()



#== Verbal person marking

df_ling_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = vPerson, y = mean_freq, fill = vPerson)) +
  # geom_violin(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_boxplot(fill="white", alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  guides(fill = "none")

df_ling_freq %>% subset(vPerson %in% c("Absent", "Agent")) %>% 
  group_by(Category, vPerson) %>% 
  summarise(N.lang = n(), mean_mean_freq = mean(mean_freq), sd_mean_freq = sd(mean_freq))

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * vPerson + (1|language), 
     data = df_ling_freq %>% subset(vPerson %in% c("Absent", "Agent")))
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ vPerson | Category) %>% pairs()
```



# Cultural features and frequency (only those that showed significant effects)

```{r}
df_culture <- read.csv(here("Results", "df_culture.csv"), header=TRUE)

df_cult_freq <- df_culture %>% inner_join(df_freq_z) %>% 
  pivot_longer(starts_with("freq_mean"), names_sep = "__", 
               names_to = c("tmp", "Category"), values_to = "mean_freq") %>% 
  select(-tmp) %>% 
  mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels =c("Nouns", "Verbs", "Adjectives")))


#== Individualism vs. collectivism

df_cult_freq %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individualism, y = mean_freq, group = Category)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Category, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  guides(fill = "none")

fit <- lmer(mean_freq ~ Category * individualism + (1|language), 
     data = df_cult_freq)
# summary(fit)
Anova(fit)
emmeans(fit, ~ individualism | Category, at = list(individualism = c(-1, 1))) %>% pairs()

df_cult_freq %>% group_by(Category) %>%
  summarise(
    r = cor(individualism, mean_freq, use = "complete.obs"),
    p = cor.test(individualism, mean_freq)$p.value)
```
